title: [Abandoned Warehouse, Entry]
description: Stacks of boxes form a narrow corridor around you, looking more than a bit unstable in their piling.  A light layer of dust covers them, as if this place had not been cleaned in some time.

wayto.14089: ;e if UserVars.rogue_password.nil? or UserVars.rogue_password.empty?; echo 'No Rogue Guild password has been set.'; echo 'example:  ;vars set rogue_password=kick, slap, turn, scratch, kick, slap'; exit; end; fput 'lean door'; UserVars.rogue_password.split(/, */).each { |verb| fput "#{verb} door" }; fput 'go door'
